title: Ctenitis aspidioides
uses: Ctenitis aspidioides, a plant native to tropical regions, has been traditionally used in folk medicine. It has been reported to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. intro: Ctenitis aspidioides, also known as the Chinese Brake fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues.
